artifact: Join member to major and filter Angela Sanders by full name.
sql: SELECT mj.major_name FROM member AS m JOIN major AS mj ON m.link_to_major = mj.major_id WHERE m.first_name = 'Angela' AND m.last_name = 'Sanders';

raw_response.sql: SELECT mj.major_name FROM member AS m JOIN major AS mj ON m.link_to_major = mj.major_id WHERE m.first_name = 'Angela' AND m.last_name = 'Sanders';
